text_block_list.text:
I decide to take a very tired Curren Chan to the
infirmary to rest.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna rest a bunch and recharge all of my
cuteness. ♪
Ruuumble...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ungh... What's that sound?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wait. Where am I?!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Eeeee! Currreeen!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...I can hear everyone's voices. They're coming
down from the sky!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And these clothes... this is what I wear at my
winning concerts. And on my feet...
Ruuumble...

text_block_list.name: PA Announcement
text_block_list.text:
All systems online. Main engine ignited. Ten
seconds to liftoff.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm finally going to outer space! All right! ☆ Now I
can show the whole galaxy how cute I am! ♪

text_block_list.name: PA Announcement
text_block_list.text: Three... Two... One...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Lift off! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hel-lo, outer space! The cutest girl in the universe
has just arrived!

text_block_list.name: Outer Space Curren Fan
text_block_list.text: ☆♪♯＄♪☆! Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what? Was that... a dream? Wow... A
dream...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. A concert in outer space. I wish I could do
that for real! Haha! ♪

Maybe it's because she had such a fun dream, but
Curren Chan seems to be well rested.

text_block_list.name: PA Announcement
text_block_list.text: Beep! Beep! Engine malfunction! Repeat. Engine malfunction!

text_block_list.name: PA Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Reaction control system failure. Please evacuate
immediately.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
What?! No! Hold on! I've gotta go meet all my
fans in outer space!

text_block_list.name: PA Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're not gonna make it... Time to blow up
now. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Haha! What a cute announcement!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, what?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh? A dream?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow. My heart's still pounding.

Due to her nightmare, Curren Chan doesn't
manage to get enough rest.
